creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
The patch found at[1] updates games/stonesoup and games/stonesoup-sdl to
0.12.2. The runtime issues have been fixed.

I will testdrive it for a while an officially submit it during the
weekend. Feel free to test this stuff :)

Regards Tobias

[1]:	https://gist.github.com/blabber/5793502
